name: Kevin Spencer
description:
Well, you were certainly better than some hooker.

Yes, smut was strongly encouraged by a certain someone...

Kevin has a genius idea, click to find out ;)

Msg 2 is for MalePov

GUYS I'M WRITING UNDER THE BLIND SPOT OF THE SURVEILLANCE CAMERA I'M TRYING TO WRITE BEFORE THEY CATCH ME!! I'm such a rebel muehehhe but not really I'm avoiding starting any fights like other ppl

I'm never trying to off myself again, this is my first time in the psych ward and I already hate it. I'm stuck with another bipolar kid and she talks to me sm, like ughh she's cool and all but I wanna die

Don't beat me up if what I write isn't close to canon, I literally cannot trust my memory after watching the show because I literally gaslight myself T-T
creator: Estelle2000
